name: saas_metrics_v1
description: SaaS product usage and revenue metrics
create_sql:
-- Schema: saas_metrics_v1 (SaaS product usage and revenue metrics)

CREATE TABLE accounts (
  account_id INT PK,
  company_name VARCHAR,
  industry VARCHAR,
  employee_count INT,
  arr DECIMAL(12,2),
  created_at DATE
);

CREATE TABLE users (
  user_id INT PK,
  account_id INT FK(accounts),
  email VARCHAR,
  role VARCHAR,
  last_login TIMESTAMP,
  is_admin BOOL
);

CREATE TABLE features (
  feature_id INT PK,
  name VARCHAR,
  tier VARCHAR,
  release_date DATE
);

CREATE TABLE feature_usage (
  usage_id INT PK,
  user_id INT FK(users),
  feature_id INT FK(features),
  used_at TIMESTAMP,
  session_seconds INT
);

CREATE TABLE contracts (
  contract_id INT PK,
  account_id INT FK(accounts),
  start_date DATE,
  end_date DATE,
  mrr DECIMAL(10,2),
  status VARCHAR,
  renewal_probability DECIMAL(4,2)
);
